subcodes.title: Words to pilgrims in June 1906
subcodes.first_line: A food that is prepared in love and partaken of in love gives one great delight. Nay, whatever is done with love imparts great delight. When we were in Baghdad
subcodes.subjects: @hospitality, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @stories; anecdotes, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion
